title: Alaska coach honored at National KidWind Challenge
summary: Alaska coach honored at National KidWind Challenge Congratulations to Megan Coniam, who received a Coaches Award at the 2019 National KidWind Challenge! Megan, a science teacher at American Charter Academy (AMC) in Wasilla, participated in the last two state KidWind Challenges but this year was the first time she, or anyone from Alaska, had attended the National KidWind Challenge, which was held this year in Houston...
